ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature (°C) */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature (°C) */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature (°C) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity (%) */,
  "rainfall" INTEGER /* Total rainfall (mm) */,
  "snowfall" INTEGER /* Total snowfall (cm) */,
  "thunderstorms" INTEGER /* Number of thunderstorm days */,
  "fog_days" INTEGER /* Number of fog days */,
  "tornadoes" INTEGER /* Number of tornadoes */,
  "hail_reports" INTEGER /* Number of hail reports */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Data version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "recorded_by" INTEGER /* User who recorded the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual entry, automated sensor) */,
  "quality_flags" TEXT /* Data quality flags or issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_recorded_by FOREIGN KEY ("recorded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the weather station is located */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., surface, satellite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "data_processed" INTEGER /* Whether the accessed data was processed or analyzed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data processing job */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the job */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being processed */,
  "processing_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job started */,
  "processing_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job ended */,
  "job_status" TEXT /* Status of the job (e.g., pending, running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_jobs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality issue */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry with the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality issue */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue resolution (e.g., open, in_progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_issues_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
